phases.name: Write loop_runner tests
phases.reasoning: Create src/cmd/autoresearch/loop_runner.rs with all type definitions (LoopConfig, LoopOutcome, LoopSummary, LoopGitOps trait), the resolve_prompt_path helper, a stub run_loop function, and all 10+ tests with mock implementations (MockGit, AlwaysMutator, ScriptedExecutor). Tests cover: path resolution, dry run, single keep, consecutive failures triggering specialist switch, budget exhaustion, failure counter reset on keep, baseline advancement, missing prompt file skip, disk persistence, and summary accounting. Tests should compile but fail against the stub.

phases.name: Implement run_loop orchestrator
phases.reasoning: Implement the full run_loop() async function: initialize state directories, open/create ResultsLog and BudgetTracker, set up git branch (create or checkout for resume), handle dry run early exit, then run the nested specialist/experiment loop with budget gate (ESTIMATED_EXPERIMENT_COST), failure gate (max_failures), experiment execution via run_single_experiment, keep/discard/error match handling with git commit/reset, baseline advancement, consecutive failure counting, and budget persistence. Wire mod.rs with pub mod loop_runner and connect cmd_autoresearch to call run_loop. Run cargo clippy. All 10+ tests must pass.
